name: Farmer's Strata
recipeIngredient: 1 pound sliced bacon, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a skillet until crisp; add ham and onion. Cook and stir until onion is tender; drain.
2. In a greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish, layer half the bread cubes, potatoes, and cheese.
3. Top with all of the bacon mixture. Repeat layers of bread, potatoes, and cheese.
4. In a bowl, beat the eggs; add milk, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, salt, and pepper.
5. Pour over all. Cover and chill overnight.
6. Remove from refrigerator 30 minutes before baking.
7. Bake, uncovered at 325 degrees for 65-70 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean. Yield: 12-16 servings.
